## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read and agree to follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] My changes do not include any secrets, tokens, passwords, private IP addresses, internal hostnames, or other sensitive information
- [ ] I have tested any commands or configuration examples I added or changed
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation, if applicable
- [ ] I have updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md), if applicable
